info.name: Additional files actions
info.summary: Enable optional file actions in Nextcloud Files
info.description:
This app allows accounts and users to enable additional, optional file actions in the Nextcloud Files app.
Due to the growing number of community requests for specialized file actions, it’s not practical or desirable to include them all in core. This app serves as a modular solution to enable such actions on demand.
Features: - Toggle optional file actions through a simple interface - Enable per-user or globally (if applicable) - Designed to be extensible for future or community-contributed actions - Maintains a clean core while giving users flexibility
Perfect for power users and admins who want more control over their file operations without cluttering the interface for everyone.
info.author: John Molakvoæ
